title: Harry's Quality Crafts
description: A datapack which adds many needed crafting recipes into Minecraft
body:
### There are many crafting recipes that do not exist in Minecraft. The aim of my datapack is to add these needed recipes into the game, via survival friendly recipes.
### Certain dyes are now easier to craft, calcite and tuff can be crafted to be more consistent with other stones and you can finally craft mushroom blocks! 

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/OlbKuarMkYA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>Featured on my YouTube Channel
